body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v2/archives/contract/status/update 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v2/archives/contract/status/update 
 ## 接口描述 
更新合同状态信息，支持针对合同状态进行变更为已暂挂，取消暂挂，终止状态，只有履行中、未履行、暂挂中的合同可以修改状态 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":null}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"EMPNUMBER","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"00210416","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"contractSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80ID","exampleValue":"1952","maxLength":"20","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%EF%BC%8C%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%E5%92%8C%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E5%90%8C%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractNbr","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"CON20240507101713","maxLength":"150","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%EF%BC%8C%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%92%8C%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E5%90%8C%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","required":true,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E5%8F%98%E6%9B%B4%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"5","maxLength":"1","desc":"%203%EF%BC%9A%E7%BB%88%E6%AD%A2%EF%BC%8C5%EF%BC%9A%E8%A7%A3%E9%99%A4%E6%9A%82%E6%8C%82%EF%BC%8C6%EF%BC%9A%E6%9A%82%E6%8C%82"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"true","desc":"","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%09","exampleValue":"true","desc":"","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%09","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{BaseURL}/api/v2/archives/contract/status/update?EMPNUMBER=00210416&contractNbr=CON20240507101713&status=5
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": true,
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | E0003| 业务执行错误|
  | EROOR1| 系统错误|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v2/archives/contract/status/update

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v2/archives/contract/status/update

接口描述

更新合同状态信息，支持针对合同状态进行变更为已暂挂，取消暂挂，终止状态，只有履行中、未履行、暂挂中的合同可以修改状态

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":null}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"EMPNUMBER","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"00210416","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"contractSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80ID","exampleValue":"1952","maxLength":"20","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%EF%BC%8C%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%E5%92%8C%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E5%90%8C%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractNbr","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"CON20240507101713","maxLength":"150","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%EF%BC%8C%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%92%8C%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E5%90%8C%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","required":true,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E5%8F%98%E6%9B%B4%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"5","maxLength":"1","desc":"%203%EF%BC%9A%E7%BB%88%E6%AD%A2%EF%BC%8C5%EF%BC%9A%E8%A7%A3%E9%99%A4%E6%9A%82%E6%8C%82%EF%BC%8C6%EF%BC%9A%E6%9A%82%E6%8C%82"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"true","desc":"","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%09","exampleValue":"true","desc":"","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%09","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{BaseURL}/api/v2/archives/contract/status/update?EMPNUMBER=00210416&contractNbr=CON20240507101713&status=5

响应报文

{
    "body": true,
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息
E0003 业务执行错误
EROOR1 系统错误
